sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) part. act. Kal of the root יָרָה , pr. watering, sprinkling ( Hos 6:3), hence the former rain which falls in Palestine from the middle of October to the middle of December, preparing the earth to receive the seed. Deu 11:14 Jer 5:24.

(2) pr.n. see חָרִיף . [This should be יֹורָה; see above.]
